Species.body: New Dragonfly Species: Lyriothemis keralensis in Kerala
Two New Marine Worm Species: (Annelida: Neredidae) in Bay of Bengal
Two new ant fly species Metadon ghorpadei & Metadon reemeri discovered in Delhi (Northern Ridge forest) & TN (Siruvani hills, Western Ghats)
New Reed Snake Species ‘Calamaria mizoramensis’ Discovered in Mizoram

Two New Slender-Armed Frog Species Discovered in Arunachal Pradesh
Soman’s Slender Arm Frog (Leptobrachium somani) and Mechuka Slender Arm Frog (Leptobrachium mechuka)

Two New Earthworm Species 'Moniligaster girishi’ and ‘Drawida reynoldsi’
Discovered in Silent Valley National Park, Kerala
New Genus & Species of Blind Miniature Fish ‘Gitchak nakan’ Discovered in Assam
New Plant Species ‘Osbeckia zubeengargiana’ Discovered in Manas NP
New Earthworm Species ‘Drawida vazhania’ Discovered in Kerala
A new species of cockroach, ‘Neoloboptera peninsularis’, discovered in Deccan Peninsula, in Nathachiwadi, Pune MH
New burrowing Reed Snake Species ‘Calamaria garoensis ’ Discovered in Meghalaya
Two new spider species, Psechrus ntu and Psechrus phenshunyu, in Nagaland and completed the first comprehensive taxonomic revision of Indian whip scorpions ‘Thelyphonids’ in over 100 years.
New Worm-Eating Snake ‘Trachischium lalremsangai’ Discovered in Mizoram
Scientists Discovered New Lynx Spider Species Hamataliwa mawlyngot in Meghalaya
Two new microscopic snail species, Georissa meghalayaensis and Acmella bensoni, in Krem Puri and Arwah limestone caves, Meghalaya
